modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to remove blackout dates in 25Live locations.

full_description_text: User wants to know how to get rid of blackout dates. They’re working in 25Live and hit a snag. Just need a quick way to clear those dates out.

description: User wants to know how to get rid of blackout dates. They’re working in 25Live and hit a snag. Just need a quick way to clear those dates out.
